task:
/home/user/Documents/cylinder_points.ply is an ASCII PLY with 1500 points sampled on a vertical cylinder (axis along Z) centered at the origin with radius 1.5 and height 6.

Fit a cylinder primitive to the cloud (the fit yields a triangulated cylinder mesh) and export only the fitted cylinder entity as a PLY mesh at /home/user/Documents/fitted_cylinder.ply. Do not export the original cloud. The output must be a mesh with at least 30 vertices, a bounding box that fits within [-2, -2, -3.3]..[2, 2, 3.3] (approximately diameter 3, height 6), and a Z extent of at least 5.5.

verification.description: At least 30 vertices in cylinder mesh
